overview.description: The Leverage Shares 2X Long ALB Daily ETF (ALBG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in materials equity. The fund aims to provide 2x leveraged exposure to the daily price movement of Albemarle Corporation (NYSE: ALB) stock, less fees, and expenses. ALB produces lithium, bromine, and other essential materials for batteries, electronics, and industrial applications. ALBG was launched on Jan 13, 2026 and is issued by Leverage Shares.
